targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, zero_recall::double precision / NULLIF(turns, 0) AS value FROM analytics.turn_recall_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, count(DISTINCT payload #>> '{record,top_k,0}') AS value FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 1 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT jsonb_array_length(payload #> '{record,vector_hits}') AS vector_hits, count(*) FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 1 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((payload #>> '{record,timings,total_ms}')::double precision)) AS value FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 1 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS workspace_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT workspace_id::text FROM analytics.turn_lineage ORDER BY 1
list.label: workspace_id
list.name: workspace_id
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS workspace_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT workspace_id::text FROM analytics.turn_lineage ORDER BY 1
